title: 2 Rolls White Mesh Ribbon for Wreath Crafts, 6 Inch x 30FT Per Roll Metallic Foil Deco Mesh Rolls Decorative Fabric Rolls for Christmas Tree Wreath Garland Swag Basket Home Party Decor
features: You will Received: Package includes 2 Pack b;lack deco mesh 6 inch rolls , each poly burlap deco mesh with 6 inch wide and 30 feet(10yards) length. You can buy different color and quantity to match your different holiday party decorations

Flexible Material: This decorative ribbon are made of high-quality mesh cloth. It is flexible, lightweight, waterproof, durable and reusable. Colorful craft mesh are enough for you to use in your daily life and can help you decorate many crafts

DIY Crafts Home Decor: This deco mesh ribbon with bright color and eacy to cut,you can use your imagination to make your holiday home decorations more unique and eye-cathing. Holiday Party Decorations: This fabric mesh wreath making supplies for a variety of decorative uses, such as decorative bows, wreaths, garlands, gift wrapping, wedding party decorations,craft home decor projects,etc. Perfect for Summer day, baby shower, birthday, Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving, New Yeay decorations

description: Features: 1. Mesh Ribbon: You will get 2 rolls of mesh ribbon, each roll wide 6 inches, and length of the ribbon is 30 Ft, Total length is 60FT, large size for wreath making. 2. Premium Material: Our mesh ribbon are made of high-quality mesh cloth. It is flexible, lightweight, waterproof, durable and reusable. Our mesh holds its shape well and no loose threads hanging on your wreath. 3. Widely Used: These mesh ribbon are perfect for a variety of decorative uses, such as making bows, wreaths, garlands, wedding arches, gift wrapping, home decor and more. You can use ribbons to decorate themed events such as Easter, St. Patrick's Day, Independence Day, Thanksgiving, Halloween, Christmas etc. 4. DIY with others: The ribbon for wreaths can be applied for DIY with your friends, lovers, classmates, which can cooperate your relationships. 5. Elegant decorations: The wire mesh ribbon can be a nice decoration for your home, yard and garden, which can make your house more charming and attractive. Specifications: Material: polypropylene Color: as the pictures shown Size: 2rolls 6 inches x 30 feet Notes: Manual measurement, please allow slight errors on size. The color may exist slight difference due to different screen displays.
